_meta.method: Cross-referenced União Budista Portuguesa (uniaobudista.pt) member directory, AZI dojo directory (zen-azi.org), Sōtōshū Europe directory (sotozen.com), Olhar Budista sangha index, plus organisation websites for the Zan Mai Zen network and the Wild Flower Zen / Sangha Flor Silvestre. Each entry verified against an official lineage organisation or the centre's own site.
_meta.coverageEstimate: High (~90%) for organised Zen sanghas with a website. Likely complete for AZI/Deshimaru, Zan Mai Zen, Sōtōshū-registered, and Wild Flower Zen networks. Plum Village PT representation likely undercounted (informal weekly home sanghas not indexed). No active Rinzai, Sanbō Zen, Kwan Um, or Ōbaku presence located.
knownGaps: Plum Village informal home sanghas (Lisboa, Porto, Coimbra) not all listed on plumvillage.org directory
No Kwan Um Zen presence found in Portugal as of 2026
No active Rinzai or Sanbō Zen International groups found
Wild Flower Zen Coimbra group (Avenida Antero de Quental 265) and Montemor-o-Novo AZI group both have weekly practice but no standalone site — included as places
Some Zan Mai Zen sub-dojos (Pinhal Novo, Mértola) exist but specific street addresses not published

places.name: Centro Zen de Lisboa — Ryumonji (Dojo Zen de Lisboa)
places.notes: Founded 1997. Responsible: Rev. Yves Shoshin Crettaz. Registered with Sōtōshū Europe and AZI; UBP member.

places.name: Grupo Zen do Porto
places.address: Centro Cultural Senhora da Hora, Avenida Fabril do Norte, 4460-312 Senhora da Hora
places.notes: AZI dojo group, oriented by Dojo Zen de Lisboa. Saturday zazen 10h50.

places.name: Grupo Zen de Aveiro
places.address: Rua Marques Gomes 2, Edifício Vera Cruz, 1.º andar, fração I, 3800-221 Aveiro
places.notes: Oriented by Dojo Zen de Lisboa; UBP member.

places.name: Grupo Zen de Montemor-o-Novo
places.notes: Affiliated with Dojo Zen de Lisboa / AZI; UBP member. No standalone website — UBP directory is canonical listing.

places.name: Zen Dojo Tai Ku An
places.address: Barão de São João, Lagos (purpose-built dojo, 2005)
places.notes: Founded 1988 by Betty Pujol and Carl Zimmerling, both disciples of Taisen Deshimaru Roshi. Practice in Barão (Tue/Thu) and Lagos (Wed at Espaço Ahimsa).

places.name: Dojo Zen Bashô-An (ZaZen Setúbal)
places.lineage: Sōtō / Deshimaru (via Master Pierre Soko Leroux, Barcelona)
places.notes: Hombu-dojo of the Zan Mai Zen network. Teacher: Manuel Toei Simões.

places.name: ZaZen Montijo (Zendō)
places.notes: Founded 2020 by Manuel Toei Simões. Part of Zan Mai Zen.

places.name: Dojo da Via Autêntica (Dojo Zen da Caparica)
places.address: Quinta do Albino 58, Vale de Milhaços, Corroios
places.notes: Founded 2024. Part of Zan Mai Zen network.

places.name: Dojo Zen Pinhal Novo
places.notes: Founded 2023 within Zan Mai Zen. Teacher: Manuel Toei Simões.

places.name: Dojo Zen de Mértola
places.notes: Founded 2025. Part of Zan Mai Zen network.

places.name: Zan Mai Zen — Dojo Zen da Perfeita Tranquilidade (sede)
places.notes: Headquarters of the Zan Mai Zen association. Teacher: Manuel Toei Simões, ordained 2012 by Master Pierre Soko Leroux.

places.name: Wild Flower Zen — Coimbra group
places.address: Avenida Rua Antero de Quental 265, sala 901, Coimbra
places.notes: Local Coimbra practice group of Sangha Zen Flor Silvestre; Thursday zazen 19:30–20:30. Annual retreats hosted at Instituto Secular Servas do Apostolado, Coimbra.

places.name: Plum Village Porto Sangha
places.notes: Lay sangha in Thich Nhat Hanh tradition; weekly mindfulness meditation in Matosinhos.

places.name: Almond Blossom Sangha (Sangha Flor de Amêndoeira)
places.notes: Monthly Mindfulness Day in the Algarve in Plum Village tradition; English and Portuguese.
